name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_readiness_blocker_report
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReadinessBlockerReport decomposes live hover surface-wake validation blockers into audit-only next actions.
note: Primary diagnostic report for live hover surface-wake validation readiness.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReadinessGate supplies powered-source transient-probe target-coverage temporal-resolution and runtime-coupling readiness fields.
note: Upstream live-validation readiness gate.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTemporalResolution supplies fast-arrival sampling constraints and target-level transient probe flags.
note: Temporal substepping evidence source.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeTransit supplies rotor-resolved ground and ceiling wake transit targets behind the readiness gate.
note: Wake transit target source.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeValidationRunMatrix consumes this readiness gate before any live transient probe run can be treated as pending.
note: Downstream run-status consumer.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live powered-source and transient surface-wake probe evidence.
note: Upstream CFD target for live hover surface-wake validation.

name: surface_wake_readiness_blocker_report
value: Wait for powered-source and transient probe APIs then verify complete rotor-surface-clearance targets target-level probe backing strict fast-arrival substepping and closed runtime coupling before starting live hover surface-wake validation.
note: Method keeps live surface-wake validation evidence separate from gameplay coupling.
